scripts.copy-favicon: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join(__dirname, 'assets', 'logo.png'); const destDir = path.join(__dirname, 'assets'); if (!fs.existsSync(destDir)) fs.mkdirSync(destDir, {recursive: true}); ['favicon.png', 'icon.png', 'adaptive-icon.png', 'splash.png'].forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(src, path.join(destDir, f))); console.log('Icons generated successfully');"
scripts.setup-logo: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const svgPath = path.join(__dirname, 'assets', 'Madhura Energy Logo-03 - Copy.svg'); const svg = fs.readFileSync(svgPath, 'utf8'); const match = svg.match(/base64,([^\"]+)/); if (match) { const buffer = Buffer.from(match[1], 'base64'); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(__dirname, 'assets', 'logo.png'), buffer); console.log('Logo generated from SVG successfully'); } else { console.error('Could not find base64 image in SVG'); }"
